title: Replace Electrical Transformers
name: Electrical transformer replacement at Porterville Developmental Center
statement_of_work: Install medium-voltage transformers, conduit, fittings, and new wiring to upgrade the electrical system at Porterville Developmental Center.
deliverables: Install MV transformers and associated electrical equipment
Run conduit, wiring, and fittings to meet facility electrical requirements
Provide final testing and handoff documentation for installed systems
description: Contractor to furnish all labor, materials, tools, equipment, and transportation necessary to install MV transformers, electrical conduit, fittings, and wire at Porterville Developmental Center.

mandatory_bidder_conference.notes: Porterville Developmental Center, PO Modular Bldg
